//: Hobby plan only allows daily cron jobs. The spec wants sub-daily cadences (pricing every hour, expiry every 10 min, filter matches every 15 min). Once you upgrade to Vercel Pro, change schedules to: pricing-update '0 * * * *', expire-leads '*/10 * * * *', match-filters '*/15 * * * *'. For now everything runs once a day so the preview can deploy on Hobby.
